verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Arise and shine, King Theophany has come, Let’s hold to His unchanging hand. Praise the Lord, Praise His name And be garrisoned by prayer;

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Don’t let the devil Shake your confidence Or in your heart put fear. Don’t you hate your brother, That’s the root of bitterness; We’ve got to walk in that way Of holiness, of holiness.

verse.name: C3
verse.lines: Kick him down, kick him down, Have the devil on the run; A son of God must not be Trodden down, So kick that mamba down.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Cover your face, cover your feet With reverence and humility, Let’s go into action with God - given ability. Stand flatfooted in your trials, Though they may be Sometimes mean;

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Always remember to call Jesus on the scene. Remember everyday to have the token on display, It’s an act of love so follow That Dove, That snow-white Dove, That snow-white Dove.

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: Unconquered by tradition, In this day we stand, Like Joshua and Caleb, We’re going to take that land; But brother it won’t be easy, It’s not a flowery bed of ease,

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: Remember that old devil, Will bring on that terrible squeeze; Don’t let him have you blue, Wondering what you’re going to do: For we’re on that Seventh Peak, So, we’ll just speak; We’ll just speak.
